response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong foundational engineering credentials, broad language proficiency, and genuine scale experience at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP requests per second), but the resume shows no evidence of the role's core competencies: experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis for bias detection and rollout risk. The Principal/IC6 seniority level demands demonstrated ownership of cross-team experimentation architecture and growth measurement systems—none of which appear in any form across 15+ years of work history. The candidate's depth is in full-stack product engineering and developer tooling, which is adjacent but not aligned.
strengths: Broad language coverage matching JD requirements (C, C++, Java, C#, TypeScript/JavaScript) with verified production use across multiple employers
Demonstrated high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second using low-latency, async I/O techniques
Long track record of technical leadership and mentoring (Staff-level roles, TDD evangelism, organizing code katas and workshops)
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience: no A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, or rollout-risk management anywhere in the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work: the JD's core instrumentation and measurement requirements have no corresponding evidence

Seniority gap: current positioning is Senior/Staff IC; the role is Principal/IC6, which typically requires demonstrated cross-org influence and ownership of foundational systems at enterprise scale—not present
